inventory: I am on the streets
There is a wedding hall here.
I know there's a recycling sweatshop behind the building
I see garbage strewn near the gutter.

right_panel.content:
Had a dream where some nintendo comfy game like tomodachi life had become super mainstream and lots of merch was made.

They all had nfc sensors and magnets, and people in third world countries had recycled its parts to make everyday things like clothes and paper plates.

Then someone hacked into the amiibo network and started pulling people with super magnetism.
right_panel.footer_note: Ah, I knew this would happen.

inventory: The interface is a slippery mobile keyboard.
The overengineering is palpable.
I am in the inner world's inner world

right_panel.content: I had a dream where i was vibecoding and the ai started making personal attacks
right_panel.footer_note: This was like my paranoia dream where I showed the wikipedia entry for my fetishes

inventory: I experience the world only from a screen
Distance is priority

right_panel.content:
Had a dream about people ai generating slop movies and that'd seeped into real life and mumbai was under attack by kaiju dinosaurs 
 
I was some national treasure under special protection who had to work only three hours a week
right_panel.footer_note: Mark Fisher ahh

inventory: is this a videogame

right_panel.content: I had dreams last night of screens full of lasers and projectiles and someone whispering Odysseus over and over
right_panel.footer_note: i namedrop Achilles and Patroclus to performative male

inventory: Orientalist?
Fascist projection of a pure state, free from degeneracy?
I watched the party scene from Lost in Translation too

right_panel.content: Had a dream where nivi organized a nobel prize equivalent for Japanese residents in india. The winner had introduced weed to japan or some synthetic equivalent and nivi was already a pro at using it
right_panel.footer_note: Daily startup idea ahh dream

inventory: I had gifted K a copy of Mark Fisher's book once
My attempts at converting people into debatebros was looking futile

right_panel.content: Had a dream where K took me to a high school library to steal a book about economics from there
right_panel.footer_note: I like acid marxism because dude acid lmao

inventory: hehehaha dommy mommy meme xddd
I am getting ulted on the street

right_panel.content: Had a nap dream where psylocke kept ulting me when i try to sleep and i mean it literally not metaphorically
right_panel.footer_note: it means my body physically hurt

inventory: My dead dad was also there

right_panel.content:
Had a dream where i died because i was in Bangalore as the nuke fell there.
I was able to experience death on mental command, like turned off sensation on all my nerve endings irl.
right_panel.footer_note: Blunt metaphor for nuking my Bangalore dreams

inventory: I check to see if the grass is anime or pixelated

right_panel.content:
Had a dream where i got a machine and could listen to my pet typhlosion.
We were travelling together.

My typhlosion♀ was having trouble courting a male one so i used the pokemon speech machine to help
right_panel.footer_note: No projection of second person desires here

inventory: I had seen this art installation once where they made a fight stick with only Akuma's "ten" kanji on it as the only button

right_panel.content: Had a dream where tan told me ac shadows is very good actually and then my keyboard changed to a posh one where each key is an oled display
right_panel.footer_note: AC Shadows is so bad as a story, what compelled them to decompress 12 days of historical events into a multi year epic

inventory: Back in 2018 I was genuinely impressed by the Black Panther movie.
How even the most mainstream of kids movies were allowed to express thoughts that would get the average Bhakt pissbaby livid.

right_panel.content: Had a dream where I was pretending to be black panther from Marvel Rivals and was fighting a tiny tiger. I kept throwing spears and dashing until my cooldowns ran out and then it bit my finger
right_panel.footer_note: I hate playing twitch-reaction up-close heroes. There is definitely a design problem in conveying presence in the hero-shooter engine

inventory: tan and my modding dreams never came to fruition
he had a google play publishing co. called suttit tech
he had an app for math formulae

right_panel.content: Had a dream where i met some genius SE Asian guy who used his intellect to decompile and modify old games. Like a loving indian parent, I told tan to compare himself with him, "see? How he has made good use of his intellect?"
right_panel.footer_note: true if true

inventory: Contact with autism is one of my most beloved experiences
I ran into this cafe in Guwahati once run by a Japanese Vtuber
He had the entire library of every Shonen Jump series.
Cutouts of his vtuber persona
Love Live and Idolm@ster music playing all the time

right_panel.content: Had a dream where some guy nearby was the biggest Ace Attorney fan in the country, he lived in a humble old shack but had piles of manga in the room and cutouts of the main characters
right_panel.footer_note: I zoned out of the AA franchise when i didnt have buttons for immediate punchgratification

inventory: Original Ken Sugimori art is Hauntology in action
They have this faded watercolor look to them that is now attributed to poor scanners.
Same goes for the pastel pink Sailor Moon cels, they were corrupted VHS tapes.
Truly the feathered dinosaurs and colored Greek statues of nerd media

right_panel.content:
Had a dream where i went into this anime merch store that was clearly failing, like it was only 30% usual 3d printed stuff, 30% normal showpieces and 30% grocery. I was getting sad at Nivi's sponsors and then i found this sick RBY themed jacket and shoes.

Red was Pikachu themed(?)

Blue had pixel art

Green had a dope magikarp shoes and fisherman jacket

Yellow was more normiechu
right_panel.footer_note: Dead Malls are also Hauntology in action. They represented inaccessible territory to me as a child, during their "alive" state, because I had no ability to visit them on my own. I fetishized them as "where western kids third space" and assumed "youth culture" developed organically there.

inventory: A Kumbhanda is a Buddhist fae creature, I do not even remember why i made that name association- it told me what it was itself

right_panel.content: Had a dream where i met a reincarnated kumbhanda who appeared as an old man and his beast form was a disguised car that could change panels and lights
right_panel.footer_note: Something something fascination of fairy storytelling to layer on with the tactilely absurd- why else would a car need to be able change panels on the go

inventory: Sheik in the smash bros series has a classic edgy ninja silhouette. It has ingrained in me a brain association of moving in triangular divekick motions- the momentum of a kunai piercing and bouncing

right_panel.content: Had a dream where nish was at comic con and he was working on some stall with 80 sheik cosplayers and he was also somehow dating them all
right_panel.footer_note: Nish used to be the "arrested development serial one-generation-down dater": a label I am apt to apply to myself now, navigating autistic perception mismatches of what courtship means and the generational privilege-sexism drift;ie because of sexist attitudes women will be less likely to be in my values space unless they're a socioeconomic class above me or a temporal generation below me

inventory: I oscillate between how "cool and whimsical" a tech company should be- from "this is exactly what would make my parents mad" to "you're not irony literate enough to embody these gifts at face value"

right_panel.content: Had a dream where i was given reins to some company and they were bankrupt because the previous guy invested in waifu AI for every single thing. Like every object would have an anime figurine next to it with AI, even the microwave.To use the TV you had to first beat an AI called Buddha in Tekken, some other guy was trying it but the stand holding the TV was broken in so many places I was holding it up the entire time
right_panel.footer_note: Honestly impressed with the worldbuilding, cynical leftist online skit-esque

inventory: The first time I met Judith was on a dating app, and she'd hit me with an opening salvo of wishing to transition into a masc.
I shudder to write down if it was just a filter for conservative men.

right_panel.content: Had a dream where Judith had transitioned into a guy and no one in my friend group believed it was them. They called them "oh it's just one of your twinks". I apologized to them over text but i was unable to type anything that didn't look like a chatgpt generated message
right_panel.footer_note: I've had this lifelong reputation of collecting sad twinks into my cult of personality. "Everyone who becomes close to me ruins their life" used to be a common self deprecating refrain

inventory: The Garbagrihas of Dravidian temples are downright cyclopean if not illuminated. Wonder why they use fluorescent lighting instead of recreating some ancient lightspace.

right_panel.content: Had a dream where the overworld was pokemon and the dungeons were dark souls and the dark souls level was on the 20 rupee note.The overworld logic meant one or two paths connecting different spots (sometimes through caves or forests). The dark souls dungeon design meant a microcosm of that very looping and interconnected form.
right_panel.footer_note: The 20 rupee note was a crisp dark maroon. That should be on more real life currency notes. The attached image is somewhat representative.

inventory: If you see me post pictures of a random bush POV, it often means i stopped to pee there and am recording the serendipitious sight. An almost gacha-like approach in the frontier of curating nature.

right_panel.content: Had a dream where I was looking for a toilet in some cafe. Found one that had labels for like five gender identities and "little naive" under the male icon. I hesitated till I woke up.
right_panel.footer_note: Pee dreams are anxiety inducing. They often reflect the urge to pee in real life and there's a legitimate worry that it would lead to the act in real life. Convoluted dream logic delaying the act saves the day.

inventory: Is Bjorn Anderson to blame for all Bishonen dysmorphia

right_panel.content:
Had a dream where i took multiple selfies of me androgynously passing

Because i played lies of p before sleep

compared to most 'photography' dreams, i was not prevented from taking it via bullshit reasons
right_panel.footer_note: Supposedly in the sexist hellpile of South Korea, Bishonen men are marketed as catering to the "Older Sister" gaze

inventory: My "VR experiments" have led me to strongly believe that "bodily attraction", "presence" are all phantom sensations, layered deep under the cultural/psychosexual gaze. Something about a figure resembling a human overwhelming your field of view is all it takes to fool your brain you can feel their body heat or presence

right_panel.content:
Had a dream where I was playing this run-of-the-mill AR shooting game where you had to shoot zombies with a physical gun

And then one bit me in the leg and it was an irl monkey
right_panel.footer_note: The Apple Vision Pro was out recently and making unrequited buzz as usual

inventory: I love projecting feelings of the "high tech low life" aesthetic into the gullies of Indian electronics markets. Purportedly only for supplying parts for repair components and student projects, the lack of informational overview among the sellers themselves is fascinating.They often don’t know what a part is for in a broader sense, yet somehow stock the most obscure, hyper-specific hacks.. There is also an amazing construction-from-first-principles culture where i saw a store getting components for Fight sticks (literally no market here btw) but they used them to jerry rig a portable NES clone, complete in a varnished-in-desi-gaze wooden box

right_panel.content: Had a dream where i was in a cyberpunk future and things were so bad everyone had to switch off their lights so that cars could recharge. Also I was spiderman
right_panel.footer_note: The spiderman part was just my subconscious bypassing the traversal problem asap.

inventory: Of all mythological symbolism, the Tree of Life is not one I am significantly fixated on. Perhaps it has just transferred onto the realm of stock, though clever interpretations are always here and there.

right_panel.content: Had a dream where there was this giant jrpg tree behind my house and I'd take super zoomed in videos of the village below it. Drove down to the village below but you could only learn mundane magic like catching fish or something
right_panel.footer_note: I think I had minor Tetris effect when Elden Ring had just come out, always looking out for the guidance of grace out of the corner of my eye in the wilderness

inventory: Metroidbrainia games are defined by knowledge-and-puzzle gating, often in the context of a timeloop.

right_panel.content:
I'm surprised. I left no notes, other than "it sure was a metroidbrainia"

Probably a satisfying one at that
right_panel.footer_note: Archons and muses of Game Dev, stop abandoning me
